title: Graph Browser Configuration
description: Configuration for a graph-browser instance: title, source URL, and node kind definitions.

title.description: Display title for the graph. Shown in the sidebar header, browser tab, and used as the localStorage namespace.

description.description: Short description of what this graph covers.

sourceUrl.description: URL to the source repository. Shown as a 'Source' link in the legend. Set to empty string to hide.

kinds.description: Node kind definitions. Keys are kind IDs used in graph.json nodes. Each kind defines how nodes of that type are displayed.

color.description: Hex color for this kind's nodes (e.g. '#58a6ff').
